method_summary: Clustering pharmacokinetic curves using unsupervised machine learning with Euclidean distance as the dissimilarity measure.
key_innovation: Demonstrating that unsupervised clustering of PK curves can independently validate pharmacogenomic conclusions without genetic information.
datasets_used: 250 PK curves from a previous pharmacogenomic study
best_result: Unsupervised ML clustering with Euclidean distance independently validated the same conclusions as reference pharmacogenomic results, first such demonstration.
title: Clustering plasma concentration-time curves: applications of unsupervised learning in pharmacogenomics
